vocab.example: Let me give you a quick update on the project.
vocab.example_vi: Để tôi cập nhật nhanh cho sếp về dự án.

vocab.example: The project is on track to finish this week.
vocab.example_vi: Dự án đang đúng tiến độ để hoàn thành trong tuần này.

vocab.example: One task is a bit behind schedule this week.
vocab.example_vi: Một công việc đang hơi chậm tiến độ tuần này.

vocab.example: We reached the testing milestone yesterday.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi đã đạt mốc kiểm thử vào hôm qua.

vocab.example: Can you summarize the key points for me?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thể tóm tắt các điểm chính cho tôi không?

vocab.meaning_vi: báo cáo lên cấp cao hơn
vocab.example: We may need to escalate this issue to management.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta có thể cần báo cáo vấn đề này lên cấp trên.

vocab.example: The key point is we need one more day for testing.
vocab.example_vi: Điểm chính là chúng tôi cần thêm một ngày để kiểm thử.

vocab.example: The next step is to follow up with that team.
vocab.example_vi: Bước tiếp theo là theo dõi với đội đó.

lines.speaker: Duc (manager)
lines.text: Linh, can you give me a quick update on the project?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Sure. Overall, the project is on track to finish by Friday.

lines.speaker: Duc (manager)
lines.text: Great. Any parts that are behind schedule?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: One task is behind schedule because of a delayed API from another team.

lines.speaker: Duc (manager)
lines.text: Okay. Did we reach any milestones this week?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Yes, we reached the testing milestone yesterday.

lines.speaker: Duc (manager)
lines.text: Good. Can you summarize the key points for me?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: The key point is we need one more day for testing before release.

lines.speaker: Duc (manager)
lines.text: Should we escalate the API delay?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: I think so, if it's not fixed by tomorrow.

lines.speaker: Duc (manager)
lines.text: Alright. What's the next step then?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: The next step is to follow up with that team this afternoon.

questions.q: What did Linh say about the overall project status?
options: It is on track to finish by Friday

questions.q: Why is one task behind schedule?
options: Because of a delayed API from another team

questions.q: What is the next step Linh mentions?
options: Follow up with the other team this afternoon

shadowing: Let me give you a quick update on the current project status.
Overall, the project is on track to finish by the end of this week.
One task is a bit behind schedule because of a delayed API.
We finally reached an important milestone in testing yesterday afternoon.
We should escalate this issue to management before it gets worse.
